rationale: The reserved LLP name being transferred. Reuses MLLC-1A's entity.reserved_name (31 MRSA §1509 / §804-A reservations are treated as candidate-entity-name attributes throughout 31 MRSA).
Name of the person or entity that originally reserved the name and is now transferring it (the transferor). Mirrors MLLC-1A's name_reservation.original_applicant.name.
Name of the person or entity receiving the reserved name. Reuses MLLC-1A's name_reservation.transferee.name.
Single-line transferee address (form does not split components). Parallel shape to MLLC-1A's name_reservation.transferee.address.
Date the transferor signed the document.

label_verbatim: ORIGINAL APPLICANT (Transferor) / (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the transferor (or duly authorized person signing on the transferor's behalf). Shape D per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md, mirroring MLLC-1A. The adjacent '(signature of any duly authorized person)' line is wet-ink-only — no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Typically populated with the reserved name being transferred.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($20 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — meaningless on a name-reservation transfer (no entity is created), but the cover-letter primitive includes it. Typically left blank.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
